title: Terra-Plenty
description: A Biome and Dimension mod that changes many things in the world and adds new ores , weapons , armors , villager professions and many more for you to explore!!!
body:
# Terra-Plenty

A Biome and Dimension mod that changes many things in the world and adds new ores , weapons , armors , villager professions and many more for you to explore!!!

<details>
<summary>Spoiler for mod's items</summary>

># Items:
>>### ` Obsidian ore, tools, armor, blocks and gems `

>>### `Blueanium ore, tools, armor, blocks shards and an igniter for going in the new dimension`

</details>

<details>
<summary>Spoiler for mod's Biomes</summary>

># Biomes:
>>### 1. `Montane Forest` 
>>### 2. `Ice Montane Forest`
>>### 3. `Blue Flower Forest (<-you can find blueanium ore only in Blue flower forest)`

</details>

<details>
<summary>Spoiler for mod's dimensions</summary>

># Dimensions:
>>### `Currently there is only one dimension the "Blueanium Dimension", but more are comming soon!!!`

</details>

-New things coming soon in the next update!!! 

<details>
<summary>What is Comming Soon:</summary>

1. # Dimensions:

    1. ### `Redanium Dimension`
    2. ### `Yellownium Dimension`

   
2. # Biomes:
   1. ### `Redanium Biome`
   2. ### `Yellownium Biome`

3. # Items (many items)-

</details>

Any bugs that you find report them in our discord community server here ->https://discord.gg/EG8ywXRQ

Have Fun !!!
